title: Build
description: Build table schema (file_num: 17) - Product build components

SequenceNumber.description: Internal unique identifier for this specific BOM component record.

LastModifiedTime.description: Timestamp indicating the last time this BOM component record was modified.

ProductSeq.description: Foreign key (SequenceNumber) linking to the parent Product record (the item being manufactured). Indexed.

Order.description: Specifies the display order of this component within the Bill of Materials list for the parent product.

Qty.description: The quantity of this component part required to build ONE unit of the parent product.

PartCode.description: The product code of the component item used in the build. Links back to the Product table.

Flags.description: A bitmask field storing various boolean settings/attributes related to this component in the BOM (e.g., optional component).

Memo.description: User-entered notes or instructions specific to this component within this particular Bill of Materials. (Mutable: freely, script-only)
